title: Right click
drDigitalIntro:
A right click opens a hidden menu of extra options.
• Click with two fingers at once instead of one.
• Try it: right-click the link below to open it in a new tab.

playgroundTask.instructions: Right-click the link below, then choose "Open link in new tab".

drDigitalSuccess: Great right-clicking! See how it opened a whole menu of options?
drDigitalHint: Press down with two fingers at the same time on the link to open the menu, then choose "Open link in new tab".
